name: Azure MRI Surescan Pacemaker
description: The Azure MRI Surescan Pacemaker is a medical device designed to enable safe MRI scans for patients with pacemakers. It uses a proprietary algorithm that automatically adjusts the pacemaker's settings during an MRI scan, minimizing the risk of pacemaker malfunction or overheating. The technology also includes a built-in sensor that detects when an MRI is about to start and switches the pacemaker into a safe mode.
